motivation: Response to reviewer N3 (incompleteness confound) and MF-2 (info delta confound). Tests whether controlling for per-clause token delta changes type/layer effects.

model2_with_info_delta.note: Info delta significant; each additional token difference increases violation odds by 1.7%

model3_layer_only.note: Layer NOT significant in full-data model (p=0.317)

model4_layer_with_info_delta.note: Layer sign FLIPS (spec -> negative) after controlling for info_delta; info_delta absorbs layer variance

layer_effect_sensitivity.interpretation: Layer effect was already non-significant (p=0.317) in the full-data logistic model. Adding info_delta flips the sign (spec advantage disappears), confirming C3 fragility. The spec-ling difference in the chi-squared test (p=0.017) arises from marginal rates, but disappears when modeled with condition as covariate.

type_coefficient_changes_m1_vs_m2.note: Reference: authorization_scope. Incompleteness is the only type that remains significant (p=0.022) after adding info_delta, with minimal coefficient change (7.9%). Coreferential shows the largest change (662%) because its info_delta is exactly 0 (amb and unamb variants have same token count).

model1_vs_model2.note: Adding info_delta significantly improves fit beyond ambiguity_type

model3_vs_model4.note: Adding info_delta significantly improves fit beyond layer

key_insight: Coreferential has info_delta=0 (identical token count for amb/unamb variants), yet it has the lowest violation rate (31.6%). This means coreferential's low rate is NOT driven by information addition — it is genuinely less nocuous. The confound applies primarily to incompleteness and authorization_scope (info_delta ~35 tokens).
conclusion: Layer effect (C3) is non-significant in full logistic model (p=0.317) even before adding info_delta, and flips sign after (coef: +0.09 -> -0.10). Info delta is a significant covariate (p=0.001). However, incompleteness remains the only individually significant type (p=0.022) with only 7.9% coefficient change, indicating its high violation rate is real beyond the information confound. Coreferential (info_delta=0) provides a clean lower bound unaffected by the confound.
